description_long: This is a boxy, utilitarian van with a predominantly gray body and bold black striping along the sides and roof. The van features a flat front with rectangular headlights and a large windshield, providing ample visibility for the driver. The side panels are largely uninterrupted except for a sliding door on one side and subtle wheel arch details. The roof has a rectangular vent or hatch, suggesting possible ventilation or access. The rear of the van is equipped with large, dark-tinted windows and red tail lights, while the wheels are robust and designed for urban roads. The overall design is reminiscent of classic cargo or delivery vans commonly seen in city environments.
description: A gray van with black stripes, flat front, large windows, and a roof vent, designed for urban cargo or passenger use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long black stripe, sliding door, and wheel arches.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large rear window, red tail lights, and the black roof stripe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar black striping and wheel arches, no visible side door.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the flat nose, large windshield, and rectangular headlights.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
